name: Dera
description: The Dera is a repeater that fires super-heated plasma.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Dera is a repeater that fires super-heated plasma.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.7
patchlogs.changes: Returned the Dera and Dera Vandal to it’s barrel alternating VFX.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Dera Vandal not alerting enemies when listed as an alarming weapon in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to trade the Dera Vandal Blueprint, Karak Wraith Blueprint, Strun Wraith Blueprint, Snipetron Vandal Blueprint/Barrel and Sheev Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Dera series damage has been reduced in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Increased the damage of the Dera in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue that allowed the Dera to retain damage bonuses from Volt’s Electric Shield, resulting in higher than normal damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons are now available for use in Conclave:  Dera, Dera Vandal, Boltor, Boltor Prime, Tonfa, Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords, Glaive, Glaive Prime, Kestrel, Fragor, Wraith Karak.
patchlogs.fixes: o   DERA VANDAL: A customized version of the Dera, featuring a metallic finish and Lotus decal. (If Nef Anyo is victorious at the end of the Event.)

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the weapon fire sound effects on the Dera and Hind.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.6+13.0.7+13.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Dera's camo skin not properly using Color Tints.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.6.0: The Vectis!
patchlogs.changes: Corpus Dera wielded by enemies now match Clan Tech Dera (alternate between top and bottom barrels when firing).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated visual effects for Dera muzzle flash

patchlogs.name: Update 9.6
patchlogs.changes: Dera muzzle flash is now affected by Energy Colour!

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes:
Added custom reload animations for Dera, Supra, Lanka, Ogris, Lex, and Kraken.
Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Dera not updating with custom colours in the arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.4: Double Affinity Weekend!
patchlogs.changes: The Dera Energy Rifle now uses both barrels.
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Dera's laser bolts will always hit to the let of the crosshairs

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.
Dera

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage on Dera Energy Rifle.
